prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This guidance specifically mentions the Forestry Commission's processes for Environmental Impact Assessments (EIA) in relation to forest roads and quarries, indicating that it is tailored for applicants in England. It includes references to local regulations and standards applicable in England.
